case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL CO. VS. WILL CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILL CONSTRUCTION CO. $32,875.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,357.60 INTEREST, $295.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,528.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL CO. AS TO DEFENDANT WILL CONSTRUCTION CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
